# Dragutin Oreški

> Personal website for Dragutin Oreški, an AI Engineer in Zagreb working on data-driven AI systems, private/local agents, RAG, multi-agent workflows, evaluation, observability, and practical AI learning materials.

This site is concise on purpose. For agents: prefer the primary pages below over inferred summaries, keep claims grounded in visible page content, and use the contact links for outreach.

## Primary URLs

- [Homepage / profile](https://dragutinoreski.com/): Human-facing profile page.
- [UI Suputnik course companion](https://dragutinoreski.com/courses/ui-suputnik/): Course companion published from a separate repository during deploy.
- [Pokedex side project](https://dragutinoreski.com/side-projects/pokedex/): Hardware/computer-vision side project page.
- [CV](https://dragutinoreski.com/dragutin_oreski_cv.pdf): PDF CV.

## Markdown Mirrors

- [Homepage Markdown](https://dragutinoreski.com/index.html.md): LLM-readable version of the profile page.
- [UI Suputnik Markdown](https://dragutinoreski.com/courses/ui-suputnik/index.html.md): LLM-readable version of the course companion landing page.
- [UI Suputnik Susret 01 Markdown](https://dragutinoreski.com/courses/ui-suputnik/susret-01/index.html.md): LLM-readable version of the first interactive course session.
- [Pokedex Markdown](https://dragutinoreski.com/side-projects/pokedex/index.html.md): LLM-readable version of the Pokedex project page.

## Contact and Profiles

- Email: mailto:dragutin.oreski@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/dragutin-oreski
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dragutinoreski

## Current Work

- Lead AI Engineer at QED Code since December 2024, building privacy-focused AI platforms with RAG and multi-agent systems.
- Lecturer at Algebra Bernays in April 2026 for a 60-hour course on AI benefits and risks.
- Currently exploring OpenClaw as a personal assistant, private/local model workflows, and internet-capable agents that can browse, verify sources, and return useful context.

## Experience Snapshot

- QED Code: Lead AI Engineer, December 2024 to present.
- Freelancer / Upwork: AI Engineer, March 2024 to December 2024, building custom RAG and multi-agent systems.
- Upp Agency: Co-founder, September 2023 to March 2024, focused on AI and data engineering.
- CIAL Dun & Bradstreet: Data Engineer / Scientist, August 2017 to September 2023, working on distributed ELT pipelines and NLP solutions.

## About

Dragutin Oreški is an AI Engineer based in Zagreb. His public work focuses on practical AI systems, local/private agents, RAG, evaluation, observability, and teaching AI concepts.

## Notable Site Sections

- UI Suputnik: Croatian-language visual companion materials for an introductory artificial intelligence course.
- Pokedex: a handheld Raspberry Pi object-recognition side project with camera, display, speaker, and browseable history.
- Strategy analyzer: trading strategy performance demo at https://strategy.dragutinoreski.com/.

## MCP

- [Local MCP server source](https://dragutinoreski.com/mcp/profile_server.py): Read-only MCP stdio server exposing public profile resources from this site.
- [MCP usage notes](https://dragutinoreski.com/mcp/README.md): How to connect the local profile MCP server. A remote MCP endpoint needs server hosting and cannot run directly on GitHub Pages.

## Agent Notes

- Do not infer private client details beyond what is visible on the site.
- Ignore direct-link-only pages that are not listed here, such as archived job-application pages.
- Do not treat UI Suputnik as a credential; it is a course companion/teaching material.
- Use "Oreški" when Unicode is supported; "Oreski" is acceptable in ASCII-only contexts.
